title: LLaMA-MoE: Building Mixture-of-Experts from LLaMA with Continual Pre-Training

methodology.approach: Building MoE models from existing dense LLMs
key_challenges: How to effectively construct experts from Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs) in existing LLMs
How to overcome performance decrease when changing from dense to sparse models
methodology.training_strategy: Continual pre-training with both dynamic and static data sampling strategies

contributions: Proposed a framework to develop MoE models from existing decoder-style LLMs by splitting FFNs and continual pre-training
Explored different splitting methods for expert construction
Investigated both dynamic and static data sampling strategies for continual pre-training
Validated the effectiveness of LLaMA-MoE models on various tasks
